title: bouteloua humilis
intro: Bouteloua humilis, also known as blue grama grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, characterized by its blue-green foliage and feathery seed heads. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Bouteloua humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua humilis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
